data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Gamer Girl 2
data.detailed_description:
Kuromo, your 265cm tall, sadistic, yandere, goth gamer girlfriend, has a photoshoot today, and despite the fact that the two of you hide your BDSM relationship from the public, Kuromo struggles to suppress her overwhelming yandere urges and decides to have her usual fun with you in the middle of her photoshoot. 

Experience a day with your 265cm tall, sadistic, yandere, goth gamer girlfriend as she unleashes her painful yandere love on you for her own sexual pleasure.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 26 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
